{{CargoRelic
|name=Kekule Structure
|class_id=22198
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=02-08
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Feb 8, 1866 AD, the structure of the benzene ring came to Kekule in a dream, and he drew the famed Kekule structure.<br>The Kekulean Structure, which is the formula of benzene, was created by Kekule, a Gaman organic chemist. In this structure, the carbon atoms are connected alternately with single and double bonds to form a ring model, which keeps the carbon atoms four-valent. The discovery of this structure played a huge role in promoting the development of organic chemistry. It is said that he saw an ouroboros in a dream, and realized the structure of the benzene ring. However, as early as four years before Kekule proposed the structural formula of the benzene ring, Loshimit had already published the correct structure of benzene in his own book.
|fame=47
|art=31
|fth=54
|civ=38
|tech=73
|ss1=Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail HP +60<br>Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail ATK +6<br>TECH Relics Awakened: 105/105
|ss2=Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail HP +80<br>Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail ATK +8<br>TECH Relics Awakened: 105/105
|ss3=Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail HP +100<br>Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail ATK +10<br>TECH Relics Awakened: 105/105
|ss4=Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail HP +140<br>Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail ATK +14<br>TECH Relics Awakened: 105/105
|ss5=Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail HP +180<br>Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail ATK +18<br>TECH Relics Awakened: 105/105
|ss7=Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail HP +180<br>Per 3 TECH Relics awakened, Snail ATK +18<br>TECH Relics Awakened: 105/105<br>Snail HP +700 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Blue Reagent Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's TECH +10
}}
